title: Resources should be closed
description: Resources should be closedAnalyze your codeintentionality-completereliabilityBugcwesymbolic-executionleakdenial-of-servicecertA function call tofopenoropenmust be matched with a call tofcloseorclose, respectively.Why is this an issue?What is the potential impact?How can I fix it?More InfoThe standard C library providesfopenand the system callopento open and possibly create files. Each call to one of these functions must be matched with a respective call tofcloseorclose.Failing to close files that have been opened may lead to using up all of the OS’s file handles.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Resource opened/allocated but not properly closed - potential resource leak
Resource allocation without corresponding cleanup in same scope
Resource allocated in control flow without proper cleanup path
Function contains resource management violations - verify proper cleanup
